economic_notes: COVID-19 impacted operations through band office closure, increased member demand, and cancellation of events. First Nation has energy partnerships including Gitchi Animki Energy Limited Partnership and Muskoka Solar LP. White Lake Limited Partnership formed February 2007 to hold and manage business ventures for the improvement of general welfare of Pic Mobert First Nation.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence relating to accounts receivable in a government business enterprise consolidated under modified equity basis (White Lake Limited Partnership). The qualification also existed in the prior year (March 31, 2020). Financial statements are for year ended March 31, 2021 filed October 31, 2022 - significant filing delay. Complex consolidation structure includes 7 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 2 GBEs on modified equity basis. Due to Regional Power Inc. balance of approximately $19,835,505 represents development costs incurred on behalf of Gitchi Animki Finance Corp by White River Hydro Limited Partnership. Land claims account had overdraft of $450,536 at year end. The encoded text in the document made some figures difficult to extract with full precision.
